title: IT234 ARCHIVED - Income of Deceased Persons - Farm Crops - Canada.ca
content:
## IT234 ARCHIVED - Income of Deceased Persons - Farm Crops

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin discusses an interest in a crop that is sown but not harvested to a deceased taxpayer who farmed the land that he owned or rented or who rented land that he owned to a sharecropper.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format it234-e.html
